title: The Unreliable Observatory
creative_premise: An instrument that reports weather from impossible places. The visitor operates it; the site never explains a project, sells a product, or asks for conversion.
visual_law: Warm paper field with black technical ink and one rust-red signal color.
Circular measuring instrument is the primary spatial grammar.
Typography combines literary serif observation with terse instrument labels.
Motion behaves like imperfect measurement: drifting points and a physical needle, never dashboard animation.
behavioral_law: Every scan produces a named impossible place, a climate, and an operator note.
Sound is opt-in and generated locally through Web Audio after a direct gesture.
The experience works without sound, pointer precision, account state, network APIs, or personal data.
Spacebar and the visible scan control invoke the same interaction.

independence_boundary.allowed_relation: Shared repository operations and provenance only; no shared creative identity.

rollback: Revert the source commit or remove the hosting route while retaining Git history.
